name: Paramannam
steps: Cook the rice in milk on low heat, stirring, until completely soft and creamy.
Melt the jaggery with a spoon of water and strain the syrup.
Take the rice off the boil and stir in the jaggery syrup — off heat, so the milk never splits.
Fry cashews and raisins in ghee and fold in with cardamom.
Serve warm as naivedyam — the first sweet made for every Telugu festival.
